corrections.current:
ὅτι οὐ τῇ
τῇ ἐμαυτοῦ χάριτι
corrections.note: Duplicated article τῇ in body; image shows only one τῇ.
Printed form has grave accent, not acute.

corrections.current: Εὐλογητὸς ὁ θεὸς ὁ ζῶν εἰς τοὺς αἰῶνας καὶ ἡ βασιλεία αὐτοῦ,
corrections.correct: Εὐλογητὸς ὁ θεὸς ὁ ζῶν εἰς τοὺς αἰῶνας καὶ ἡ βασιλεία αὐτοῦ·
corrections.note: Body has middle point after αὐτοῦ, not comma.
Apparatus lemma text reads οἳ παρεστᾶσιν καὶ εἰσπορεύονται, not παρεστήκασιν.
Printed text has grave accent on ἐγὼ, not acute.
Apparatus text prints εὐλόγουν without rough breathing.

corrections.correct: καὶ οὐκ ἔστιν οὐδεὶς ὃς ἐκφεύγεται
corrections.note: Missing conjunction καὶ before οὐκ ἔστιν in apparatus main text.

corrections.current: A 13 ελαθες με] ς με sup ras Aᵃ
corrections.correct: A 13 ελαθες με] ες με sup ras Aᵃ
corrections.note: Variant note lacks initial epsilon in ες με.
Variant note should read ανεστ sup ras Bab.

notes: Running head and page number match. Body generally accurate aside from duplicated τῇ, one accent, and punctuation. Apparatus mostly accurate, but one substantive misread in XII 15 and a few minor note/text slips.
